title: parnassia multiseta
intro: Parnassia multiseta, also known as the Fragrant Alpine, is a flowering plant species in the family Celastraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. Parnassia multiseta is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to treat various ailments.
